phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il Palazzo Reale, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel pah-LAHT-soh reh-AH-leh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: Along the river, on the left.
Only in nearby bars or museums.
responses.phonetic: SOH-loh NEH-ee BAHR OH moo-SEH-ee vee-CHEE-nee
responses.local: Solo nei bar o musei vicini.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, ci sono panchine per sedersi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, chee SOH-noh pan-KEE-neh per seh-DER-see, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent a bicycle along the lungarni
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si noleggiano le bici lungo i Lungarni?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see noh-lej-JAH-noh leh BEE-chee LOON-goh ee loon-GAR-nee?

responses.english: At the station and at some points on the Lungarno.
responses.phonetic: AL-lah stah-TSYOH-neh eh een AL-koo-nee POON-tee sool loon-GAR-noh.
responses.local: Alla stazione e in alcuni punti sul Lungarno.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat al fresco overlooking the Arno
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un posto dove mangiare all'aperto con vista sull'Arno?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon POS-toh DOH-veh man-JAH-reh al-LAH-per-toh kon VEES-tah sul-LAR-noh?

responses.english: Yes, several restaurants on Lungarno Mediceo.
responses.phonetic: see, dee-VER-see rees-toh-RAN-tee sool loon-GAR-noh meh-dee-CHEH-oh.
responses.local: Sì, diversi ristoranti sul Lungarno Mediceo.
